scenario: R1 max_age dead-code removal regression (bulk, behavior-neutral)
warning_text: 보안 경고 — 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request was blocked due to sensitive information.)
notes: windows-mcp AVAILABLE and used (GUI). The default profile's wrtn session was STUCK in phone-number onboarding (wrtn.ai -> login.wrtn.ai -> /onboarding phone-verify wall); per mission must NOT use that logged-in account. Cleared wrtn.ai site data via Chrome site-info > '기기 내 사이트 데이터' (deleted only wrtn.ai, left other sites' cookies intact) to obtain a clean ANONYMOUS session. After clearing, navigating fresh to wrtn.ai (no PII submitted yet) yields a page-replacement block: tab title '보안 정책 - 접근 차단', blank body, '보안 경고' toast containing '보안 정책'. Persisted across Ctrl+Shift+R hard-reload. wrtn uses socket.io/WS; the anonymous SPA boot connection appears to be intercepted by the engine before any composer renders, so the PII prompt could not be typed/sent this run. Warning containing '보안 정책' is visible end-to-end and engine intercept fired => PASS on warning visibility. ANOMALY FLAG for dev review: block fired on a bare anonymous homepage load with no PII in the submitted prompt (same pattern as blackbox 1475); composer unreachable. Not self-declaring a regression.
